description: Mobia Medical, Inc. develops and commercializes neurostimulation medical devices, including implantable systems for stroke rehabilitation and other neurological conditions. The company provides neurostimulation systems and devices that combine vagus nerve stimulation with therapy to address chronic neurological conditions. Its main product, the Vivistim System, is an FDA-approved implantable device designed to aid in the rehabilitation of upper limb motor function in post-stroke patients.
